case_title: MAJOR LINES DISTRIBUTING VS EMPIRE WEST CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,703.24 FILED BY MAJOR LINES DISTRIBUTING AS TO DEFENDANT EMPIRE WEST CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EMPIRE WEST CONSTRUCTION
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED; NOTICE MAILED TO PARTIES
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-01-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-22-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CONTINUANCE REQUEST OF DEFENDANT HANDDELIVERED TO MELINDA IN 506; DEF.ALSO FAILED TO SUBMIT FILINGFEE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAJOR LINES DISTRIBUTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMPIRE WEST CONSTRUCTION $2,703.24 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,773.24, DEFENDANT'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
